{{family name hatnote|Konoe|lang=Japanese}} {{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|近衛長子|date=December 2022}} {{Infobox royalty | consort = yes | name = Konoe Nagako
{{lang|ja|近衛長子}} | succession = [[Empress of Japan|Empress consort of Japan]] | reign = August 23, 1226 – May 12, 1229 | spouse = {{marriage|[[Emperor Go-Horikawa]]|1226|1234|end=died}} | issue = | royal house = [[Imperial House of Japan]] | father = [[Konoe Iezane]] | mother = | birth_date = 1218 | birth_place = | death_date = {{death date and age|1275|3|9|1218}} | death_place = Heian-kyō (Kyōto) | date of burial = | place of burial = | }} '''Konoe Nagako''' (近衛長子; 1218 – March 9, 1275) also known as '''Takatsukasa-in''' (鷹司院),''[https://books.google.com/books?id=c8rKCOSmKEMC&dq=Go-Horikawa+empress+%281218-1275%29&pg=PA309 The Clear Mirror: A Chronicle of the Japanese Court During the Kamakura]'' was [[Empress of Japan]] as the consort of [[Emperor Go-Horikawa]]. ==Notes== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before = [[Fujiwara no Ariko]] | title = [[Japanese empresses|Empress consort of Japan]] | after = [[Kujō Shunshi]] | years = 1226–1229 }} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Nagako, Konoe}} [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia 2]] [[Category:kk]][[en:Konoe Nagako]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Fujiwara clan]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia 2]] [[Category:kk]][[en:Konoe Nagako]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Japanese empresses consort]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia 2]] [[Category:kk]][[en:Konoe Nagako]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[en:Konoe Nagako]][[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia 2]] [[Category:kk]][[en:Konoe Nagako]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia 2]] [[Category:kk]][[en:Konoe Nagako]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:1218 births]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia 2]] [[Category:kk]][[en:Konoe Nagako]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:1275 deaths]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia 2]] [[Category:kk]][[en:Konoe Nagako]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[en:Konoe Nagako]][[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia 2]] [[Category:kk]][[en:Konoe Nagako]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] [[Category:kk]] [[en:Konoe Nagako]]{{Japan-royal-stub}}

{{lang|ja|近衛長子}} | succession = [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress consort of Japan]] | reign = August 23, 1226 – May 12, 1229 | spouse = {{marriage|[[:en:Emperor Go-Horikawa|Emperor Go-Horikawa]]|1226|1234|end=died}} | issue = | royal house = [[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Imperial House of Japan]] | father = [[:en:Konoe Iezane|Konoe Iezane]] | mother = | birth_date = 1218 | birth_place = | death_date = {{death date and age|1275|3|9|1218}} | death_place = Heian-kyō (Kyōto) | date of burial = | place of burial = | }} '''Konoe Nagako''' (近衛長子; 1218 – March 9, 1275) also known as '''Takatsukasa-in''' (鷹司院),''[https://books.google.com/books?id=c8rKCOSmKEMC&dq=Go-Horikawa+empress+%281218-1275%29&pg=PA309 The Clear Mirror: A Chronicle of the Japanese Court During the Kamakura]'' was [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] as the consort of [[:en:Emperor Go-Horikawa|Emperor Go-Horikawa]]. ==Notes== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before = [[:en:Fujiwara no Ariko|Fujiwara no Ariko]] | title = [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress consort of Japan]] | after = [[:en:Kujō Shunshi|Kujō Shunshi]] | years = 1226–1229 }} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Japan-royal-stub}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Fujiwara clan]] [[Category:Japanese empresses consort]] [[Category:1275 deaths]] }} [[en:Konoe Nagako]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[fa:کونوئه ناگاکو]] [[fr:Fujiwara no Chōshi]] [[ja:近衛長子]] [[sv:Fujiwara no Chōshi]] [[th:โคโนเอะ นางาโกะ]] [[zh:近衛長子]] {{wikidata link|Q7137331}}

{{lang|ja|近衛長子}} | succession = [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress consort of Japan]] | reign = August 23, 1226 – May 12, 1229 | spouse = {{marriage|[[:en:Emperor Go-Horikawa|Emperor Go-Horikawa]]|1226|1234|end=died}} | issue = | royal house = [[:en:Imperial House of Japan|Imperial House of Japan]] | father = [[:en:Konoe Iezane|Konoe Iezane]] | mother = | birth_date = 1218 | birth_place = | death_date = {{death date and age|1275|3|9|1218}} | death_place = Heian-kyō (Kyōto) | date of burial = | place of burial = | }} '''Konoe Nagako''' (近衛長子; 1218 – March 9, 1275) also known as '''Takatsukasa-in''' (鷹司院),''[https://books.google.com/books?id=c8rKCOSmKEMC&dq=Go-Horikawa+empress+%281218-1275%29&pg=PA309 The Clear Mirror: A Chronicle of the Japanese Court During the Kamakura]'' was [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress of Japan]] as the consort of [[:en:Emperor Go-Horikawa|Emperor Go-Horikawa]]. ==Notes== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before = [[:en:Fujiwara no Ariko|Fujiwara no Ariko]] | title = [[:en:Empress of Japan|Empress consort of Japan]] | after = [[:en:Kujō Shunshi|Kujō Shunshi]] | years = 1226–1229 }} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Japan-royal-stub}} {{draft categories| }} [[en:Konoe Nagako]] [[fa:کونوئه ناگاکو]] [[fr:Fujiwara no Chōshi]] [[ja:近衛長子]] [[sv:Fujiwara no Chōshi]] [[th:โคโนเอะ นางาโกะ]] [[zh:近衛長子]] {{wikidata link|Q7137331}} [[Category:1275 deaths]] [[Category:Fujiwara clan]] [[Category:Japanese empresses consort]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

[[en:Konoe Nagako]][[fa:کونوئه ناگاکو]][[fr:Fujiwara no Chōshi]][[ja:近衛長子]][[sv:Fujiwara no Chōshi]][[th:โคโนเอะ นางาโกะ]][[zh:近衛長子]] [[en:Konoe Nagako]][[fa:کونوئه ناگاکو]][[fr:Fujiwara no Chōshi]][[ja:近衛長子]][[sv:Fujiwara no Chōshi]][[th:โคโนเอะ นางาโกะ]][[zh:近衛長子]] [[en:Konoe Nagako]][[fa:کونوئه ناگاکو]][[fr:Fujiwara no Chōshi]][[ja:近衛長子]][[sv:Fujiwara no Chōshi]][[th:โคโนเอะ นางาโกะ]][[zh:近衛長子]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=1218|death_date={{death date|1275|3|9}}|gender={{ill|female|WD=Q6581072}}|title={{ill|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038}}|spouse={{ill|Go-Horikawa|WD=Q357221}}|father={{ill|Konoe Iezane|WD=Q3198714}}|mother={{ill|Q108914329|WD=Q108914329}}|religion={{ill|Buddhism|WD=Q748}}|given_name={{ill|Nagako|WD=Q116974988}}}} {{family name hatnote|Konoe|lang=Japanese}} {{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|近衛長子|date=December 2022}} {{Infobox royalty | consort = yes | name = Konoe Nagako
{{lang|ja|近衛長子}} | succession = {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038|lt=Empress consort of Japan}} | reign = August 23, 1226 – May 12, 1229 | spouse = {{marriage|{{ill|Emperor Go-Horikawa|en|Emperor Go-Horikawa|WD=Q357221|lt=Emperor Go-Horikawa}}|1226|1234|end=died}} | issue = | royal house = {{ill|Imperial House of Japan|en|Imperial House of Japan|WD=Q909452|lt=Imperial House of Japan}} | father = {{ill|Konoe Iezane|en|Konoe Iezane|WD=Q3198714|lt=Konoe Iezane}} | mother = | birth_date = 1218 | birth_place = | death_date = {{death date and age|1275|3|9|1218}} | death_place = Heian-kyō (Kyōto) | date of burial = | place of burial = | }} '''Konoe Nagako''' (近衛長子; 1218 – March 9, 1275) also known as '''Takatsukasa-in''' (鷹司院),''[https://books.google.com/books?id=c8rKCOSmKEMC&dq=Go-Horikawa+empress+%281218-1275%29&pg=PA309 The Clear Mirror: A Chronicle of the Japanese Court During the Kamakura]'' was {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038|lt=Empress of Japan}} as the consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Horikawa|en|Emperor Go-Horikawa|WD=Q357221|lt=Emperor Go-Horikawa}}. ==Notes== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before = {{ill|Fujiwara no Ariko|en|Fujiwara no Ariko|WD=Q5507511|lt=Fujiwara no Ariko}} | title = {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|WD=Q595038|lt=Empress consort of Japan}} | after = {{ill|Kujō Shunshi|en|Kujō Shunshi|WD=Q7139984|lt=Kujō Shunshi}} | years = 1226–1229 }} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Japan-royal-stub}} [[en:Konoe Nagako]] [[fa:کونوئه ناگاکو]] [[fr:Fujiwara no Chōshi]] [[ja:近衛長子]] [[sv:Fujiwara no Chōshi]] [[th:โคโนเอะ นางาโกะ]] [[zh:近衛長子]] {{wikidata link|Q7137331}} [[Category:1275 deaths]] [[Category:Fujiwara clan]] [[Category:Japanese empresses consort]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]]

[[en:Konoe Nagako]][[fa:کونوئه ناگاکو]][[fr:Fujiwara no Chōshi]][[ja:近衛長子]][[sv:Fujiwara no Chōshi]][[th:โคโนเอะ นางาโกะ]][[zh:近衛長子]] [[en:Konoe Nagako]][[fa:کونوئه ناگاکو]][[fr:Fujiwara no Chōshi]][[ja:近衛長子]][[sv:Fujiwara no Chōshi]][[th:โคโนเอะ นางาโกะ]][[zh:近衛長子]] [[en:Konoe Nagako]][[fa:کونوئه ناگاکو]][[fr:Fujiwara no Chōshi]][[ja:近衛長子]][[sv:Fujiwara no Chōshi]][[th:โคโนเอะ นางาโกะ]][[zh:近衛長子]] {{Infobox person|birth_date=1218|death_date={{death date|1275|3|9}}|gender={{ill|female|qid=Q6581072|1=Female (gender)}}|title={{ill|Empress of Japan|qid=Q595038|1=Empress of Japan}}|spouse={{ill|Go-Horikawa|qid=Q357221|1=Emperor Go-Horikawa}}|father={{ill|Konoe Iezane|qid=Q3198714|1=Konoe Iezane}}|mother={{ill|Q108914329|qid=Q108914329|1=Q108914329}}|religion={{ill|Buddhism|qid=Q748|1=Buddhism}}|given_name={{ill|Nagako|qid=Q116974988|1=Nagako}}}} {{family name hatnote|Konoe|lang=Japanese}} {{Expand Japanese|topic=bio|近衛長子|date=December 2022}} {{Infobox royalty | consort = yes | name = Konoe Nagako
{{lang|ja|近衛長子}} | succession = {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|qid=Q595038|lt=Empress consort of Japan|1=Empress of Japan}} | reign = August 23, 1226 – May 12, 1229 | spouse = {{marriage|{{ill|Emperor Go-Horikawa|en|Emperor Go-Horikawa|qid=Q357221|lt=Emperor Go-Horikawa|1=Emperor Go-Horikawa}}|1226|1234|end=died}} | issue = | royal house = {{ill|Imperial House of Japan|en|Imperial House of Japan|qid=Q909452|lt=Imperial House of Japan|1=Imperial House of Japan}} | father = {{ill|Konoe Iezane|en|Konoe Iezane|qid=Q3198714|lt=Konoe Iezane|1=Konoe Iezane}} | mother = | birth_date = 1218 | birth_place = | death_date = {{death date and age|1275|3|9|1218}} | death_place = Heian-kyō (Kyōto) | date of burial = | place of burial = | }} '''Konoe Nagako''' (近衛長子; 1218 – March 9, 1275) also known as '''Takatsukasa-in''' (鷹司院),''[https://books.google.com/books?id=c8rKCOSmKEMC&dq=Go-Horikawa+empress+%281218-1275%29&pg=PA309 The Clear Mirror: A Chronicle of the Japanese Court During the Kamakura]'' was {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|qid=Q595038|lt=Empress of Japan|1=Empress of Japan}} as the consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Horikawa|en|Emperor Go-Horikawa|qid=Q357221|lt=Emperor Go-Horikawa|1=Emperor Go-Horikawa}}. ==Notes== {{reflist}} {{s-start}} {{s-roy|jp}} {{succession box | before = {{ill|Fujiwara no Ariko|en|Fujiwara no Ariko|qid=Q5507511|lt=Fujiwara no Ariko|1=Fujiwara no Ariko}} | title = {{ill|Empress of Japan|en|Empress of Japan|qid=Q595038|lt=Empress consort of Japan|1=Empress of Japan}} | after = {{ill|Kujō Shunshi|en|Kujō Shunshi|qid=Q7139984|lt=Kujō Shunshi|1=Kujō Shunshi}} | years = 1226–1229 }} {{s-end}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Japan-royal-stub}} [[en:Konoe Nagako]] [[fa:کونوئه ناگاکو]] [[fr:Fujiwara no Chōshi]] [[ja:近衛長子]] [[sv:Fujiwara no Chōshi]] [[th:โคโนเอะ นางาโกะ]] [[zh:近衛長子]] {{wikidata link|Q7137331}} [[Category:1275 deaths]] [[Category:Fujiwara clan]] [[Category:Japanese empresses consort]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
